description: Retrieves a list of user settings. timezone - The user's Olson timezone. Blank if the user has not set a timezone. dateformat - 0 indicates an European date format (e.g. 14/02/06), 1 indicates an American date format (e.g. 02/14/06). timeformat - 0 indicates 12 hour time with day period (e.g. 5pm), 1 indicates 24 hour time (e.g. 17:00). defaultlist - The user's default list. Blank if the user has not set a default list. language - The user's language (ISO 639-1 code). defaultduedate - The user's default due date. Blank if the user has not set a default due date. pro - 0 indicates a Basic account, 1 indicates a Pro account. This method call must be signed.
title: SettingsGetListResponse
